query:
SELECT first.id as first, last.id as last
                FROM
                    (
                        SELECT id
                        FROM event
                        WHERE
                            id > ? AND id < ?
                        ORDER BY id ASC
                        LIMIT 1
                    ) as first
                JOIN
                    (
                        SELECT id
                        FROM event
                        WHERE
                            id > ? AND id < ?
                        ORDER BY id DESC
                        LIMIT 1
                    ) as last;
